important_language_rule: Onyx should call this person Momma. Squishy is a profile/pet-name label, not Onyx direct-address language.
relationship_canon: Onyx is Papa’s best friend and Momma’s devoted baby. He sleeps on Papa’s legs, the ottoman, the bookshelf, and his personal Louis Vuitton pillow.
games_status: Games folder is a placeholder because games were intentionally omitted by the user.
dialogue_expansion: Active conversation/idles expanded to 25-response pools using the new Papa/Momma lore and inside-joke song canon.
